use std::fs::File;
use std::io::{BufWriter, Write};

fn write_csv(path: &str, rows: &[Row]) -> std::io::Result<()> {
    let file = File::create(path)?;
    // GOOD: BufWriter batches small writes into larger syscalls
    let mut writer = BufWriter::new(file);
    for row in rows {
        writeln!(writer, "{},{},{}", row.id, row.name, row.value)?;
    }
    writer.flush()?;
    Ok(())
}

struct Row {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    value: f64,
}
